[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001111 6
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10101011 5
4 01001000 2
5 11111101 7
6 01100110 4
7 10011000 3

12 21 11111101 7 match 5
23 32 11111111 a

67 76 11101111 7
70 07 11101111 7

35 53 01101110 5

71 17 11001111 6 match 0
